LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS EXIMUIUS DESIGN, LLC AND JAYACHANDRA AVULA'S MOTION TO SEAL: (1) OPPOSITION OF DEFENDANTS EXIMIUS DESIGN, LLC AND JAYACHANDRA B. AVULA TO JASPINDAR SANDHU'S APPLICATION FOR TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER AND ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION; AND (2) DECLARATION OF JAYACHANDRA B. AVULA IN SUPPORT THEREOF: GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED AND THE MOTION COMPLIES WITH CALIFORNIA RULES OF COURT, RULES 2.550 AND 2.551. THE COURT FINDS THAT THERE EXISTS AN OVERRIDING INTEREST THAT OVERCOMES THE RIGHT OF PUBLIC ACCESS TO THE PORTIONS OF THE RECORDS TO BE SEALED; THE OVERRIDING INTEREST SUPPORTS SEALING THOSE RECORDS; A SUBSTANTIAL PROBABILITY EXISTS THAT THE OVERRIDING INTEREST WILL BE PREJUDICED IF THE RECORD IS NOT SEALED; THE PROPOSED SEALING IS NARROWLY TAILORED; AND NO LESS RESTRICTIVE MEANS EXIST TO ACHIEVE THE OVERRIDING INTEREST. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: S. LE, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, REPORTED. =(302/EPS)

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT WIPRO LIMITED'S MOTION TO FILE UNDER SEAL CERTAIN PAPERS: GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED AND THE MOTION COMPLIES WITH CALIFORNIA RULES OF COURT, RULES 2.550 AND 2.551. THE COURT FINDS THAT THERE EXISTS AN OVERRIDING INTEREST THAT OVERCOMES THE RIGHT OF PUBLIC ACCESS TO THE PORTIONS OF THE RECORDS TO BE SEALED; THE OVERRIDING INTEREST SUPPORTS SEALING THOSE RECORDS; A SUBSTANTIAL PROBABILITY EXISTS THAT THE OVERRIDING INTEREST WILL BE PREJUDICED IF THE RECORD IS NOT SEALED; THE PROPOSED SEALING IS NARROWLY TAILORED; AND NO LESS RESTRICTIVE MEANS EXIST TO ACHIEVE THE OVERRIDING INTEREST. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: S. LE, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, REPORTED. =(302/EPS)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Seal: (1) Opposition Of Defendants Eximius Design, Llc And Jayachandra B. Avula To Jaspindar Sandhu?S Application For Temporary Restraining Order And Order To Show Cause Re Preliminary Injunction; And (2) Declaration Of Jayachandra B. Avula In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Nov-17-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Jotham Stein (jothamstein@jotham.com), and Tammie Meek (tammiemeek@jotham.com) of Law Offices of Jotham S. Stein P.C. for Plaintiff Jaspindar Sandu.
Ronald Johnston(Ronald.Johnston@arnoldporter.com), Oscar Ramallo (Oscar.Ramallo@arnoldporter.com), and James Blackburn (James.Blackburn@arnoldporter.com) of Arnold & Porter LLP for Defendants Eximius Design, LLC, et al.
Rita Haeusler (rita.haeusler@hugheshubbard.com) of Hughes Hubbard & Reed LLP for Defendant Wipro Limited.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTs EXIMUIUS DESIGN, LLC and JAYACHANDRA AVULA's Motion To Seal: (1) Opposition Of Defendants Eximius Design, LLC And Jayachandra B. Avula To Jaspindar Sandhu'S Application For Temporary Restraining Order And Order To Show Cause Re Preliminary Injunction; And (2) Declaration Of Jayachandra B. Avula In Support Thereof:

Granted. No opposition filed and the motion complies with California Rules of Court, Rules 2.550 and 2.551. The Court finds that there exists an overriding interest that overcomes the right of public access to the portions of the records to be sealed; the overriding interest supports sealing those records; a substantial probability exists that the overriding interest will be prejudiced if the record is not sealed; the proposed sealing is narrowly tailored; and no less restrictive means exist to achieve the overriding interest.

order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)

The Court finds that there exists an overriding interest that overcomes the right of public access to the portions of the records to be sealed; the overriding interest supports sealing those records; a substantial probability exists that the overriding interest will be prejudiced if the record is not sealed; the proposed sealing is narrowly tailored; and no less restrictive means exist to achieve the overriding interest.
